meta.title: The effect of tunicamycin on interferon-alpha production in a human lymphoblastoid cell line (Namalwa) -- Morser 63 (1): 213 -- Journal of General Virology

abstractHtml: Tunicamycin alters the biological properties of human interferon-alpha (HuIFN-alpha) produced in its presence by changing the mixture of IFN- alpha subtypes produced. When IFN mRNA extracted from treated cells was microinjected into oocytes the product was also altered. However, treatment of the oocytes with tunicamycin did not alter the properties of the IFN-alpha produced.
